benefits.description: Planning to use BPC-157 to address stomach issues caused by years of NSAID use

protocol_notes: Has 2 herniated discs (L3 and L5) causing daily bilateral sciatica. Has successfully used peptides for weight loss (unspecified). Planning to try BPC-157 for gut health first, then potentially Cerebrolysin or ARA-290 for neuropathic pain. Previously trialed dextromethorphan for pain relief with partial success but impractical side effects. Researching ARA-290 at 1.32mg/day or 4mg/day for 30 days.
